text: Surrounded by the sleek glass, the reflective neon, I’m alert to the tension buzzing just beneath the calm surface. In this space dedicated to research and development—R+D—I sense infinite futures branching from these curious energies. My mind, pulled between present certainty and what innovation could spark, oscillates restlessly. I feel anticipation mingling with self-doubt, a creative unease, as if possibility itself were just past the next translucent barrier.
